summary: Pre-App Store features testing complete. All 16 backend tests PASS. 7 new features verified: error tracking endpoint, network banner, ARIA accessibility, force update gate, haptic feedback service, pull-to-refresh, and request tracing middleware.

integration_issues.issue: Clicking navigation while guided overlay is shown can cause 'Something went wrong' error boundary trigger. Dismissing overlay first resolves it.

error_report_valid_payload.description: Accepts full error payload with message, stack, component, severity, platform

error_report_fatal_severity.description: Fatal severity errors are logged at ERROR level

error_report_truncation.description: Long messages/stacks are truncated gracefully (2000/5000 chars)

error_report_validation.description: Returns 422 when required 'message' field is missing

x_request_id_auth.description: X-Request-Id header present even on failed auth

x_request_id_custom_preserved.description: Custom X-Request-Id header is preserved if provided by client

network_banner_component.description: NetworkBanner component exists and is hidden when online (expected behavior)

force_update_gate_component.description: ForceUpdateGate wraps app, transparent on web (only blocks on native when version < min_version)

sidebar_aria_labels.description: Sidebar has role='navigation' and aria-label='Main navigation'

bottom_nav_aria_labels.description: Bottom mobile nav has role='navigation' and aria-label='Bottom navigation'

mobile_menu_aria_labels.description: Mobile menu nav has role='navigation' and aria-label='Main menu'

mobile_menu_button_aria.description: Mobile menu button has aria-label='Open navigation menu'

pull_to_refresh_dashboard.description: usePullToRefresh hook integrated with pullProps and PullIndicator

pull_to_refresh_vault.description: usePullToRefresh hook integrated with pullProps and PullIndicator

pull_to_refresh_messages.description: usePullToRefresh hook integrated with pullProps and PullIndicator

haptic_feedback_service.description: Exports tapLight, tapMedium, tapSuccess, tapWarning, tapError functions. No-op on web (requires Capacitor native)

error_reporter_service.description: initErrorReporting(), reportComponentError() functions. Uses sendBeacon API and RouteErrorBoundary integration

request_trace_middleware.description: RequestTraceMiddleware adds X-Request-Id to all responses and logs structured request info

client_errors_db_index.description: client_errors collection index on created_at created at startup

critical_code_review_comments: Error tracking endpoint (/api/errors/report) correctly implements Sentry-style client error capture without requiring auth
X-Request-Id header properly traces requests through RequestTraceMiddleware with 8-char UUID format
NetworkBanner uses navigator.onLine and window events - only visible during offline/reconnecting states
ForceUpdateGate only blocks on Capacitor.isNativePlatform() - web users always pass through
Pull-to-refresh uses touch events with threshold=80px and calls tapLight() for haptic feedback
All navigation elements have proper ARIA labels for accessibility compliance
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pre-App Store features (iteration 63) all verified working. NetworkBanner is only visible when browser goes offline. ForceUpdateGate is transparent on web - only blocks native apps when version is below min_version. Pull-to-refresh requires touch events to trigger. Haptics service is a no-op on web. Error reporter uses sendBeacon API for crash reports. X-Request-Id header is present on ALL API responses.
